records.question: Which buildings named Floridan Hotel at 905 Franklin Street have exactly 17 floors, were tallest from 1926–1966, and are at least 204 feet tall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.floors = 17 AND building.name = 'Floridan Hotel' AND building.street_address = '905 Franklin Street' AND building.years_as_tallest = '1926–1966' AND building.height_feet >= 204
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building where lower(name) like '%floridan hotel%' and lower(street_address) like '%905 franklin street%' and floors = 17 and years_as_tallest = '1926–1966' and height_feet >= 204 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter buildings with name like 'floridan hotel', street address like '905 franklin street', exactly 17 floors, years as tallest from 1926 to 1966, and height at least 204 feet.

records.question: Which buildings are associated with Valley City State University where enrollment is at least 1340?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE institution.institution = 'Valley City State University' AND institution.enrollment >= 1340
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building join Institution on building.building_id = Institution.building_id where lower(Institution.Institution) like '%valley city state university%' and Institution.Enrollment >= 1340 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find buildings linked to institutions named like 'valley city state university' with enrollment at least 1340, joining building and Institution tables on building_id.

records.question: Which building named Franklin Exchange Building was the tallest exactly during the years 1966–1972?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.years_as_tallest = '1966–1972' AND building.name = 'Franklin Exchange Building'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building where lower(name) like '%franklin exchange building%' and years_as_tallest = 1966 - 1972 limit 5;
records.thought: The question asks for the building named 'Franklin Exchange Building' that was the tallest exactly during the years 1966 to 1972, so we filter by name and check if Years_as_tallest covers that period.

records.question: Which buildings at least 204 feet tall are associated with Private institutions where the team is Jimmies?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE institution.type = 'Private' AND building.height_feet >= 204 AND institution.team = 'Jimmies'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building join Institution on building.building_id = Institution.building_id where building.Height_feet >= 204 and lower(Institution.Type) like '%private%' and lower(Institution.Team) like '%jimmies%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter buildings with height at least 204 feet and join with Institution to find those associated with Private institutions where the team is Jimmies.

records.question: What buildings named 100 North Tampa have at most 579 feet in height, no more than 42 floors, years as tallest exactly 1992–present, and belong to private institutions where the primary conference is AAC and the team is Skyhawks?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.height_feet <= 579 AND institution.primary_conference = 'AAC' AND institution.team = 'Skyhawks' AND institution.type = 'Private' AND building.floors <= 42 AND building.name = '100 North Tampa' AND building.years_as_tallest = '1992–present'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building join Institution on building.building_id = Institution.building_id where lower(building.name) like '%100 north tampa%' and building.height_feet <= 579 and building.floors <= 42 and building.years_as_tallest = '1992–present' and lower(Institution.type) = 'private' and lower(Institution.primary_conference) = 'aac' and lower(Institution.team) = 'skyhawks' limit 5
records.thought: Filter buildings by name, height, floors, and years as tallest, then join with Institution to filter by private type, primary conference AAC, and team Skyhawks.

records.question: Which buildings have exactly 10 floors and are located where the street_address is 315 John F. Kennedy Boulevard?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.floors = 10 AND building.street_address = '315 John F. Kennedy Boulevard'
records.pred_sql: select building_id from building where floors = 10 and lower(street_address) like '%315 john f. kennedy boulevard%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter buildings with exactly 10 floors and a street address matching '315 John F. Kennedy Boulevard'.

SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.floors = 22 AND building.name = 'Franklin Exchange Building'
records.pred_sql: select building_id from building where lower(name) like '%franklin exchange building%' and floors = 22 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter buildings with the name 'Franklin Exchange Building' and exactly 22 floors, then select their building_id.

records.question: Which buildings that belong to institutions in The Sun conference are at least 537 feet tall, have no more than 39 floors, and have enrollment of at most 616?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.height_feet >= 537 AND building.floors <= 39 AND institution.enrollment <= 616 AND institution.primary_conference = 'The Sun'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building join Institution on building.building_id = Institution.building_id where lower(Institution.Primary_Conference) like '%the sun%' and building.Height_feet >= 537 and building.Floors <= 39 and Institution.Enrollment <= 616 limit 5
records.thought: Filter buildings by joining with institutions in The Sun conference, applying height, floors, and enrollment constraints.

records.question: Which buildings named Franklin Exchange Building have exactly 22 floors, were tallest from 1966–1972, are located at 655 North Franklin Street, and are associated with institutions having enrollment of at least 1340 and no primary conference?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE building.name = 'Franklin Exchange Building' AND institution.enrollment >= 1340 AND building.floors = 22 AND building.years_as_tallest = '1966–1972' AND building.street_address = '655 North Franklin Street' AND institution.primary_conference = 'none'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building join Institution on building.building_id = Institution.building_id where lower(building.name) like '%franklin exchange building%' and building.floors = 22 and building.years_as_tallest = '1966–1972' and lower(building.street_address) like '%655 north franklin street%' and Institution.enrollment >= 1340 and (Institution.primary_conference is null or Institution.primary_conference = '') limit 5
records.thought: Filter buildings by name, floors, years as tallest, and address, then join with institutions to check enrollment and primary conference conditions.

records.question: Which buildings named Park Tower have exactly 36 floors, are at most 458 feet tall, are located at 400 North Tampa Street, and were tallest from 1972–1981?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.street_address = '400 North Tampa Street' AND building.height_feet <= 458 AND building.floors = 36 AND building.name = 'Park Tower' AND building.years_as_tallest = '1972–1981'
records.pred_sql: select building.building_id from building where lower(name) like '%park tower%' and floors = 36 and height_feet <= 458 and lower(street_address) like '%400 north tampa street%' and years_as_tallest = '1972–1981' limit 5
records.thought: Filter buildings named 'Park Tower' with 36 floors, height at most 458 feet, located at '400 North Tampa Street', and years as tallest from 1972 to 1981.
